title: calonemorchis cristata
intro: Calonemorchis cristata, also known as the crested calonemorchis, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to Australia. As a medicinal plant, Calonemorchis cristata has been used to treat various health conditions, particularly those related to the respiratory and digestive systems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, Calonemorchis cristata is often dried and used in tea form or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
